local_sources: INPS documents, official exports, optional approved read-only portal captures, emails and local scans
local_processing: Package evidence matrices and review drafts

codex_context.purpose: Structure case facts and identify conflicts or missing evidence
codex_context.content: Extracted evidence, page-level quotes, validated fact records, timelines and unresolved decisions
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Use validated fact records and targeted evidence quotes; keep complete documents and capture images local unless visual interpretation is necessary

codex_context.purpose: Relate supported official-source claims to validated case facts
codex_context.content: Case facts, relevant evidence anchors, official-source passages, calculation basis and review drafts
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Include only facts and passages required for the specific claim or calculation under review

residual_risks.risk: INPS case review can require highly specific personal, contribution, payment and health-adjacent facts
residual_risks.mitigation: Use owner-only local artifacts, page-level targeted evidence, pseudonymous actor IDs and explicit professional review; never include credentials or session material

commercialista_notice.message_it: Documenti, immagini, OCR e calcoli del caso INPS restano nella cartella locale riservata. Codex esamina i fatti strutturati e i passaggi di evidenza necessari alla valutazione professionale; credenziali e dati di sessione non vengono mai acquisiti.
commercialista_notice.message_en: INPS documents, images, OCR and calculations remain in the restricted local case folder. Codex reviews structured facts and evidence passages needed for professional assessment; credentials and session data are never acquired.

limitations: The professional issue determines which sensitive case facts are necessary
This is a design-time data-flow review, not a GDPR legal determination
